Header.title: Designed. Engineered. Built.
Header.paragraph:
Precision in Development. A Legacy in Every Home.
 Samicon is a family-owned, engineer-led development firm in Greater Vancouver, creating thoughtfully engineered family homes and modern multiplexes—designed, managed, and delivered by professional engineers.

Features.title: Engineer-Led Development
Features.text: Every Samicon project is led by professional engineers, ensuring technical excellence, efficiency, and long-term value from concept to completion.

Features.title: Family-Owned & Operated
Features.text: As a family-owned development firm, we take a personal, long-term approach to every project we bring to market.

Features.title: Greater Vancouver Focus
Features.text: We specialize exclusively in residential development within Greater Vancouver, with deep local knowledge of zoning, design, and market needs.

Features.title: Purpose-Driven Housing
Features.text: From detached homes to multiplexes, our projects respond directly to the evolving housing needs of our communities.

About.paragraph:
Samicon is a family-owned residential development company rooted in Greater Vancouver. We specialize in acquiring and redeveloping residential properties into high-quality detached homes and modern multiplexes. 
 Our philosophy is simple: a home is only as strong as the engineering behind it. That belief shapes every decision we make—from land acquisition and rezoning to design, construction, and final delivery. We are not contractors for hire; we are owners, developers, and engineers fully invested in the homes we create and the neighborhoods we help shape.

Services.name: Property Acquisition
Services.text: We strategically identify and acquire residential properties with strong redevelopment potential across Greater Vancouver.

Services.name: Residential Redevelopment
Services.text: We manage complete redevelopment projects, transforming existing properties into high-quality family homes and multiplexes.

Services.name: Multiplex Development
Services.text: In response to evolving housing needs, we specialize in converting single lots into efficient, well-designed multiplex residences.

Services.name: In-House Engineering Oversight
Services.text: Every project undergoes rigorous internal engineering review to ensure safety, efficiency, sustainability, and long-term performance.

Services.name: Rezoning & Project Management
Services.text: Our team oversees rezoning, approvals, design coordination, and execution—streamlining complex processes under one roof.
